title: Will the U.S. confirm that aliens exist before 2027?

current.rationale_summary: The base rate of an official US government confirmation of extraterrestrial life is zero across history; current UAP/Mars-biosignature news is explicitly framed as inconclusive. ~1.5% vs a market badly overpricing the lottery ticket at ~18%.
key_drivers: UAP files framed 'make up your own minds'

history.rationale_summary: The base rate of an official US government confirmation of extraterrestrial life is zero across history; current UAP/Mars-biosignature news is explicitly framed as inconclusive. ~1.5% vs a market badly overpricing the lottery ticket at ~18%.
